evals.prompt: I need to make an infographic about Bishop AI's top 5 client results. What colors and fonts should I use, and can you give me the exact hex codes and font names so I can pass them into my design tool?
evals.expected_output: A structured brand reference with exact hex codes for all Bishop AI colors, font names for each hierarchy level (title/subheading/body), and guidance on which to use where

evals.prompt: I'm building a pitch deck for Bishop AI in PowerPoint using python-pptx. Give me the brand colors as RGBColor values and tell me which fonts to assign to headings, subheadings, and body text.
evals.expected_output: Python code snippets with RGBColor values for all brand colors, font assignments for each text hierarchy level, and clear guidance on when to use each

evals.prompt: Can you make this on-brand for Bishop AI? I have a LinkedIn graphic I want to post — it needs to look professional and match our visual identity. Walk me through what styling choices to make.
evals.expected_output: Actionable styling guidance covering background color choice, text color selection, accent usage (Gold first, Blue second), typography choices, and overall visual feel
